title: WordPress Frontend Scenario 1
prompt: Implement a WordPress-style hero block renderer that outputs accessible, responsive HTML from a config object (title, subtitle, CTA, image).
constraints: Use semantic structure (section, heading, nav/button/link as appropriate)
Include accessibility attributes for image and CTA
Handle missing optional fields without breaking layout
Keep output deterministic for same input

examples.output: semantic hero markup string containing heading, supporting text, CTA link, and accessible image metadata
examples.explanation: baseline render path.

expectedApproach: State the data structure/algorithm choice, justify tradeoffs, then implement cleanly.
idealSolutionOutline: Describe optimal strategy, implement, validate with edge cases, and summarize complexity.
evaluationNotes: Reward correct logic, clear tradeoffs, and interview communication.
